outside_date_extensions.condition: if specified Exhibit A Offer conditions (excluding listed exceptions) are satisfied or waived as of the initial outside date
outside_date_extensions.note: The outside date automatically extends by 150 days (to May 5, 2027) if, on December 6, 2026, the specified Exhibit A Offer conditions (excluding listed exceptions) are satisfied or waived; no party action is required to effectuate the extension.

regulatory_approvals.name: HSR Act (FTC/DOJ)
regulatory_approvals.notes: HSR Notification and Report Forms must be filed with the FTC and DOJ as soon as practicable, no later than 15 business days after the Agreement Date, subject to timely information availability.

static_events.label: Outside Date (Extended)
static_events.note: The outside date automatically extends by 150 days (to May 5, 2027) if, on December 6, 2026, the specified Exhibit A Offer conditions (excluding listed exceptions) are satisfied or waived; no party action is required to effectuate the extension.

deadline_events.label: HSR Act (FTC/DOJ) Clearance
deadline_events.notes: HSR Notification and Report Forms must be filed with the FTC and DOJ as soon as practicable, no later than 15 business days after the Agreement Date, subject to timely information availability.

downstream.label: HSR Waiting Period Expires
downstream.rule: +15 calendar days after HSR filed (statutory — HSR Act, not stated in merger agreement)

downstream.label: Clearance Obtained
downstream.rule: HSR Notification and Report Forms must be filed with the FTC and DOJ as soon as practicable, no later than 15 business days after the Agreement Date, subject to timely information availability.

downstream.label: SEC Proxy Review Period
downstream.rule: Open-ended — SEC review (typically 10 business days for preliminary proxy)

downstream.label: Proxy Mailed to Shareholders
downstream.rule: After SEC clearance — typically ≥20 calendar days before meeting

downstream.label: Closing
downstream.rule: +2 Business Days after all conditions satisfied / waived

checklist: HSR actual filing date (Servier Pharmaceuticals LLC + DAWN)
Day One Biopharmaceuticals, Inc. stockholder meeting date (vote)
